title: Beetle named after Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Beetle named after Evangelion             Quote Post by gwern » Wed Apr 27, 2016 8:16 pm Lycocerus evangelium , specifically. Naming announced in "Taxonomic revision of the Lycocerus hanatanii species group (Coleoptera, Cantharidae), with the description of new species from Taiwan" http://web-ejt.nhm.ac.uk/index.php/ejt/ ... ad/292/569 , Hsiao et al 2016 Etymology : The specific epithet is derived from the Latin _evangelium_ (“good news”), referring to fact that its discovery was good news for the team; the specific name is also in memory of the anime _Neon Genesis Evangelion_, which is one of the greatest animes in Japanese history and had a strong impact on Japanese popular culture.

[]: Re: Beetle named after Evangelion             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Sat Jun 18, 2016 12:23 pm So cool!!! I don't work with taxonomy much, but as a biologist I hope to one day find a new species to name after a few of my favorite things

[]: Re: Beetle named after Evangelion             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Jun 18, 2016 1:32 pm Bah! Thread is useless without pictures! Here: This is the beetle in question. More info here . Neat Japanese website with more pictures here . Oh, and a twitter link! tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) But seriously, this is very cool. Thanks for letting us know!

[]: Re: Beetle named after Evangelion             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jun 18, 2016 8:51 pm It's Shamshel!

[]: Re: Beetle named after Evangelion             Quote Post by YunHSIAO » Sat Feb 18, 2017 2:05 am Hi guys. I'm the first author of this paper. I'm happy that you could enjoy our study! If anyone has interests to contact with me, you could talk to me via my twitter. https://twitter.com/YHsiaoBeetle

[]: Re: Beetle named after Evangelion             Quote Post by SoryuUberAlles » Sun Feb 19, 2017 12:46 am After I heard some species of slime mold beetle were named after Bush, Cheney and Rumsfeld, are scientists really allowed to name their discoveries after anything they want? https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Agathidium

[]: Re: Beetle named after Evangelion             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Mon Feb 20, 2017 7:29 pm SoryuUberAlles wrote: After I heard some species of slime mold beetle were named after Bush, Cheney and Rumsfeld, are scientists really allowed to name their discoveries after anything they want?
